## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

Why is this change needed? Link to a related roadmap task or issue if applicable.

## How

How was this implemented? Note any design decisions.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`go test ./...`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`golangci-lint run ./...`)
- [ ] Smoke tests verified (`roadmapctl doctor`, `roadmapctl check`)
- [ ] Documentation updated if user-facing (README, cli-contract.md)
- [ ] Roadmap task marked In Progress / Completed if applicable
